title: Query inactive users?
excerpt:
How can I get all users, including inactive users, without knowing their IDs in advance? 
query { users } can only return users with is_enabled==true, unless you know the ID already.

posts.author: zweitze (Zweitze de Vries)
posts.cookedHtml:
How can I get all users, including inactive users, without knowing their IDs in advance?
query { users } can only return users with is_enabled==true, unless you know the ID already.

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @zweitze~

By inactive do you mean users who have been deactivated?

If so, I’m afraid that we don’t currently have the ability to do this, but I’m happy to submit this as feedback!

posts.author: zweitze (Zweitze de Vries)
posts.cookedHtml:
I mean the users that appear in User management when you select Status being “inactive”.
Thanks!

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Ahhh yes, I believe this is an indication for whether or not a user has been deactivated.

Sadly this isn’t available, but I’m put in a request for you!

posts.author: Pzeldon (Paul Zeldon)
posts.cookedHtml: I second this request would be nice to pull every record in the users, disabled or not!

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Pzeldon !

I will add your vote to it!
